name: Morton's Caesar Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup freshly grated Parmesan cheese (about 3 oz.)
1 large head romaine lettuce, torn into bite-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine olive oil, red wine vinegar, anchovy fillets, minced garlic, fresh lemon juice, Dijon mustard, and white pepper in a processor or blender.
2. Blend until smooth.
3. Add Parmesan cheese and blend just until combined.
4. Season with salt to taste.
5. Prepare 2 days ahead. Bring to room temperature and whisk before serving.
6. Add croutons just before tossing the salad.
7. Serves 4.
